description: The file implements the main page component for a note-taking web application using React. It manages state, fetches notes and tags, and renders the user interface including sidebar, notes grid/list, modal dialogs, and controls for filtering, creating, updating, and deleting notes.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Fetches notes and tags based on the current application mode and query filters, updating the component state accordingly.

methods.name: createNote
methods.description: Creates a new note via API and refreshes the list.

methods.name: updateNote
methods.description: Updates an existing note via API and refreshes the list.

methods.name: deleteNote
methods.description: Deletes a note via API and refreshes the list.
